_comment: EDIT THIS FILE TO UPDATE THE CV. The design (CV Template.dc.html) reads everything from here — you never need to touch layout or styles. Keep the field names; add/remove array items freely. 'pct' (0-100) sets the bar length for skills/languages. interest 'icon' must be one of: camera, piano, chess, dumbbell.
name: Miguel Esteban Ramos Montilla
title: Electronics Engineer
subtitle: MSc Computer Science · MSc Embedded Systems (ongoing)
summary: Electronics engineer with 10+ years spanning software development, automation and tech entrepreneurship. Two international master’s degrees — Computer Science (UFMG, Brazil) and Embedded Systems & Microsystems (University of Toulouse, ongoing) — on a solid electronics foundation. Broad hands-on experience across web & backend development, automation, computer vision and embedded systems. A fast learner passionate about digital system architecture, robotics and AI, skilled at explaining complex technical ideas clearly.

experience.note: Master’s thesis — Product: Xplocam, a real-time thermal/visible image-fusion camera
bullets: Studied GStreamer video pipelines (elements, pads) for live stream processing.
Built an interactive CLI to drive the camera: live thermal/visible view, recording, RTSP server, and keyboard control of fusion threshold, transparency, mode and thermal color profiles.
Designed & implemented the Xplocam REST API: camera detection/status, mode selection (HD/4K/VGA) with frame rate, stream & RTSP control, client count, and recorded-video listing.
Explored OpenCV for processing: image transforms, color-space conversion, filtering and edge detection (Sobel, Laplacian, Canny).

experience.note: 9-year venture recovering lost pets across Latin America via geo-targeted social ads
bullets: Built the client-acquisition engine: an automated job running every 2h that scraped Facebook groups for lost-pet posts, classified them with an ML model, extracted phone numbers via country-specific regex, and auto-sent personalized ad messages.
Ran the server infrastructure with scheduled cron jobs; built multiple websites and internal management platforms.
Freelance in parallel: custom websites and web-scraping projects delivering structured data to clients.
Built the agency’s first websites and web apps; prototyped an NFC physical-interaction system for real-time “physical likes”.
Developed a full-stack brand-diagnosis platform: company surveys, statistical analysis, and personalized brand-development plans.

education.note: Software engineering · Thesis: AngularJS performance, survey of 460+ developers
Academic monitor in Digital Circuits & Electronic Devices labs

publications.title: AngularJS Performance: A Survey Study
publications.meta: M. Ramos, M.T. Valente, R. Terra — IEEE IX Latin American, 2017

publications.title: AngularJS in the wild: a survey with 460 developers
publications.meta: PLATEAU 2016 — 7th Intl. Workshop on Evaluation & Usability of PLs and Tools

publications.title: Active Tracking Position Antenna Base: Low-Cost Approximation with Servo Gimbals
